title: Chalk and Talk vs. PowerPoint for Teaching Metric Spaces
description: A flowchart comparing the two teaching methods for delivering Module 2: Concepts in Metric Spaces, highlighting their distinct processes and outcomes.
relationships: Chalk & Talk focuses on slow, deliberate pace building intuition, while PowerPoint offers structured, high-density information delivery
Both methods aim for Student Engagement but through different paths: one through interactive derivation, the other through polished visuals
The final learning outcome for both is Conceptual Understanding of metric spaces
